title: bidens mexicana
intro: Bidens mexicana, also known as Mexican Beggarticks or Mexican Bur Marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bidens mexicana include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Bidens mexicana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
